TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: cingay qsinuw nya' maki sa hlahuy sraral hiya', yan na mit, bzyok qnhyun, ngarux ru bqanux. .
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨiŋaj qs~ɕinuw njaʔ maki s~ɕa ħlaħuj s~ɕraral ħijaʔ, jan na mit, βzjok qnħjun, ŋarux ru βqanux. .
S.FORM: cingay qsinuw nya' maki sa hlahuy sraral hiya', yan na mit, bzyok qnhyun, ngarux ru bqanux. .
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨiŋaj qs~ɕinuw njaʔ maki s~ɕa ħlaħuj s~ɕraral ħijaʔ, jan na mit, βzjok qnħjun, ŋarux ru βqanux. .
